calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-08-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 09:37am
Judge Pro Tem David Fleisig, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Apellant, Modern Medical Instrument Trading Company Inc, et al., appears through counsel Jee Soo Kim. Respondent, Hyunsoo Kenneth Ahn, appears in Pro Per with Witness, employee Calvin Cho. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Fleisig.

EXHA(1): Trial Brief
EXHA(2): Envelope addressed to KIm, Andres.

EXHR(A): Request for Accounting Balance Data.

Evidence is retained, matter is under submission.

10:19am

Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
